data.title: Why Is Penguin Solutions Stock Gaining Today?
data.description: Penguin Solutions' stock is rising after announcing a strategic AI data center collaboration with SK Telecom and SK hynix at CES 2025.

data.title: Take-Two, Xometry: JPMorgan's Bets On Gaming, Manufacturing In 2025
data.description: JPMorgan analyst predicts Take-Two ($225 PT, 22% upside) and Xometry ($45 PT, 23% upside) to dominate gaming and manufacturing in 2025, with potential for even greater growth and market dominance.

data.title: Price Over Earnings Overview: M&T Bank
John Fetterman First Democratic Lawmaker To Accept Trump Invitation To Mar-a-Lago Since 2024 Election
data.description: Fetterman, a Dem senator, to meet with Trump at Mar-a-Lago, saying he's willing to work with anyone for PA. Previously clashed but now almost friends.

data.title: What's Going On With D-Wave Quantum Stock Today?
data.description: D-Wave Quantum announced strong fiscal 2024 bookings growth and a major system sale, amid CEO Alan Baratz's criticism of Nvidia's quantum timeline.
